works.title: FinFlow
works.desc: FinFlow needed an expense tracking platform for startup teams with tight budgets. Existing tools were too complex, so I designed an MVP to provide real-time spending insights for growth and fundraising.
works.alt: Smartphone displaying data analytics, colorful illustration background

works.title: LaunchPad
works.desc: LaunchPad wanted a website builder for founders without coding skills. I designed an intuitive platform for creating MVP landing pages and marketing sites to establish online presence quickly.
works.alt: Laptop displaying data graphs and charts. Business analytics concept.

works.title: HealthSync
works.desc: HealthSync aimed to provide startup teams accessible telehealth for overwhelmed employees. Traditional healthcare was slow and inaccessible, so I designed an app connecting teams to virtual care, supporting startup wellness.
works.alt: Hand holding phone with saving goal app interface. Financial planning concept.

works.title: TalentBridge
works.desc: TalentBridge aimed to create a hiring platform for startups scaling from 5 to 50 employees. I designed a solution to simplify recruitment while ensuring quality hires, addressing the unique needs of fast-growing teams.
works.alt: Abstract green oval shapes with a black line on beige background

allHeadings.text: What I bring to the table
allHeadings.parent_text: What I bring to the table

allParagraphs: startups can count on!
Crafting functional, stunning products with founders.

FinFlow needed an expense tracking platform for startup teams with tight budgets. Existing tools were too complex, so I designed an MVP to provide real-time spending insights for growth and fundraising.
LaunchPad wanted a website builder for founders without coding skills. I designed an intuitive platform for creating MVP landing pages and marketing sites to establish online presence quickly.

HealthSync aimed to provide startup teams accessible telehealth for overwhelmed employees. Traditional healthcare was slow and inaccessible, so I designed an app connecting teams to virtual care, supporting startup wellness.

TalentBridge aimed to create a hiring platform for startups scaling from 5 to 50 employees. I designed a solution to simplify recruitment while ensuring quality hires, addressing the unique needs of fast-growing teams.
User Interface Design
User Experience Design
Digital experiences that engage users and help your startup stand out from day one
Finally, meet the designer passionate about helping startups succeed – a quick peek into my world

I help startups turn big ideas into designs that actually work. Whether you need an MVP that converts or a pitch deck that closes funding, I focus on results over pretty pixels.When I'm not designing, you'll find me stargazing or hunting for the perfect coffee. I believe great design should solve real problems fast—no endless revisions, no designer ego, just stuff that works.
Head of Growth, Launchpad
Got questions? I've got answers.
